_notes: Source: iit-proj-observation (clinical research). Target: hemas-observation (clinical hospital). Source mandates LOINC coding and bans performer. Target mandates performer, adds hospital-specific extensions and local code system, and has different constraint logic. Extensions entirely different between profiles.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-obs-1 (error: LOINC code required), iit-obs-2 (error: Final observations must have value or dataAbsentReason), iit-obs-3 (warning: Quantitative results should include units)]. None of these are present in hemas-observation.
New error constraint added in target: hemas-obs-1 (error: value.exists() or dataAbsentReason.exists() or component.exists()). Source has no equivalent constraint at this scope.
New warning constraint added in target: hemas-obs-2 (warning: if laboratory category present then specimen must exist). Source has no equivalent constraint.
Mandatory extension studyTimepoint[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; hemas-observation does not define it.
Optional extension dataQualityFlag[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension queryStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
New optional extension labSection[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension reportingPriority[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New optional extension criticalFlag[0..1 mustSupport=true] added in target. Source does not define this extension.

identifier cardinality relaxed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=true] (hemas has no explicit min constraint on identifier, inherits R4 base [0..*]). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved in both.

Source category slice studyEndpoint[0..1 mustSupport=true] (patternCoding: system=https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-category, code=study-endpoint) removed in target. Hemas only has laboratory and vitalSigns category slices.
category:laboratory pattern value changed: source uses iit-proj laboratory category pattern → target uses hemas laboratory category pattern (different system URIs in the CodeableConcept pattern).
category:vitalSigns pattern value changed: source uses iit-proj vital-signs pattern → target uses hemas vital-signs pattern (different system URIs in the CodeableConcept pattern).
New binding added on Observation.code in target: extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-code). Source has no binding on the code element itself.
code.coding:loinc cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true]. Mandatory LOINC coding requirement relaxed to optional in hemas. Min decreased.
code.coding:loinc pattern value changed: source uses iit-proj LOINC system pattern → target uses hemas LOINC system pattern (different system URIs for the LOINC system in the patternCoding).

New mustSupport=true slice code.coding:local[0..1 mustSupport=true patternCoding(system=https://hemas.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/observation-code)] added in target. Source does not define a local code system slice.
Reference target profile changed: source constrains subject to [iit-proj/Patient] → target constrains to [hemas/Patient]. Both are mandatory MS references but pointing to different hospital profiles.

Reference target profile changed: source constrains encounter to [iit-proj/Encounter] → target constrains to [hemas/Encounter]. Both are mandatory MS references but pointing to different hospital profiles.
performer ban lifted: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Max relaxed from 0 to *.
performer min cardinality strictly increased: source [0..0] (banned, effective min=0) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Performer is now mandatory in hemas but was prohibited in source.
value[x] types narrowed: source includes [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, integer, boolean]; target has [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, boolean]. 'integer' type removed in hemas-observation.
issued MustSupport added in target: source does not constrain issued; target adds mustSupport=true. Optional element [0..1] in R4 base.
specimen MustSupport added in target: source does not constrain specimen; target adds mustSupport=true. Optional element in R4 base.
referenceRange.text MustSupport added in target: source does not constrain referenceRange.text; target adds mustSupport=true. Optional element in R4 base.
